languages.text: "Даргонус столь величествен! Там ко мне проявляли внимание разные люди из числа дворян. Я так поняла, что они метят в покровители для полка Заркова. Думаю, это было бы полезно, раз так принято в вашем протекторате, но я ничего про них не знаю. Помогите мне советом, прошу вас".

"Dargonus was magnificent! Back there, all kinds of nobles approached me. I gather they're interested in becoming patrons of the Zarkov Regiment. I think it might be beneficial, since that seems to be the custom in your protectorate, but I know nothing about them. Please, what is your advice?"
languages.original_text: "Даргонус столь величествен! Там ко мне проявляли внимание разные люди из числа дворян. Я так поняла, что они метят в покровители для полка Заркова. Думаю, это было бы полезно, раз так принято в вашем протекторате, но я ничего про них не знаю. Помогите мне советом, прошу вас".

traits.locale_text: "Dargonus is so magnificent! Back there, various nobles approached me. I gathered they're willing to become patrons of the Zarkov Regiment. I think it might be useful, since that seems to be the custom in your protectorate, but I know nothing about them. Give me your counsel, please."

"Dargonus was magnificent! Back there, all kinds of nobles approached me. I gather they're interested in becoming patrons of the Zarkov Regiment. I think it might be beneficial, since that seems to be the custom in your protectorate, but I know nothing about them. Please, what is your advice?"

"Dargonus is so magnificent! But several noble families showed interest in me while I was there. I understand why, of course, I am not as foolish as that — they're playing politics and trying to stake their claim as Zarkov's patrons. But I know nothing about them!"

"Dargonus is so magnificent! Back there, various nobles approached me. I gathered they're willing to become patrons of the Zarkov Regiment. I think it might be useful, since that seems to be the custom in your protectorate, but I know nothing about them. Give me your counsel, please."

"Dargonus was magnificent! Back there, all kinds of nobles approached me. I gather they're interested in becoming patrons of the Zarkov Regiment. I think it might be beneficial, since that seems to be the custom in your protectorate, but I know nothing about them. Please, what is your advice?"

languages.text: 「ドラゴナスは素晴らしい！でも、私がそこにいる間、いくつかの貴族の家族が私に関心を示しました。もちろん、私はそれほど愚かではありません。彼らは政治を演じて、ザルコフの庇護者としての地位を確立しようとしているのです。でも、私は彼らについて何も知りません！」
languages.original_text: "Dargonus is so magnificent! But several noble families showed interest in me while I was there. I understand why, of course, I am not as foolish as that — they're playing politics and trying to stake their claim as Zarkov's patrons. But I know nothing about them!"

languages.text: "Dargonus muhteşemdi! Oradayken her türden soylu bana yaklaşırdı. Zarkov Alayı'nın hamisi olmakla ilgilendiklerini anlıyorum. Protektoranızda âdetin bu olduğu düşünülürse bunun faydalı olabileceğini düşünüyorum ama onlar hakkında hiçbir şey bilmiyorum. Ne olursunuz bana tavsiyede bulunun."
languages.original_text: "Dargonus was magnificent! Back there, all kinds of nobles approached me. I gather they're interested in becoming patrons of the Zarkov Regiment. I think it might be beneficial, since that seems to be the custom in your protectorate, but I know nothing about them. Please, what is your advice?"

traits.locale_text: "Dargonus muhteşemdi! Oradayken her türden soylu bana yaklaşırdı. Zarkov Alayı'nın hamisi olmakla ilgilendiklerini anlıyorum. Protektoranızda âdetin bu olduğu düşünülürse bunun faydalı olabileceğini düşünüyorum ama onlar hakkında hiçbir şey bilmiyorum. Ne olursunuz bana tavsiyede bulunun."

languages.text: “达戈努斯真是宏伟极了！那时候，各路贵族都来接触我。我猜测，他们有意成为扎尔科夫军团的庇护人。我想这可能也是好事，毕竟这在您的属地似乎也是惯例。可我对他们一无所知。请问您对此有什么建议？”
languages.original_text: "Dargonus was magnificent! Back there, all kinds of nobles approached me. I gather they're interested in becoming patrons of the Zarkov Regiment. I think it might be beneficial, since that seems to be the custom in your protectorate, but I know nothing about them. Please, what is your advice?"

traits.locale_text: “达戈努斯真是宏伟极了！那时候，各路贵族都来接触我。我猜测，他们有意成为扎尔科夫军团的庇护人。我想这可能也是好事，毕竟这在您的属地似乎也是惯例。可我对他们一无所知。请问您对此有什么建议？”

languages.text: "Dargonus war wunderbar! Ich wurde dort von verschiedenen Adeligen angesprochen. Ich nehme an, sie würden gerne Schirmherren des Zarkov-Regiments werden. Das könnte von Vorteil sein, da es in Eurem Protektorat üblich zu sein scheint, aber ich weiß nichts über sie. Was würdet Ihr mir raten?"
languages.original_text: "Dargonus was magnificent! Back there, all kinds of nobles approached me. I gather they're interested in becoming patrons of the Zarkov Regiment. I think it might be beneficial, since that seems to be the custom in your protectorate, but I know nothing about them. Please, what is your advice?"

traits.locale_text: "Dargonus war wunderbar! Ich wurde dort von verschiedenen Adeligen angesprochen. Ich nehme an, sie würden gerne Schirmherren des Zarkov-Regiments werden. Das könnte von Vorteil sein, da es in Eurem Protektorat üblich zu sein scheint, aber ich weiß nichts über sie. Was würdet Ihr mir raten?"

languages.text: « Dargonus était magnifique ! Plusieurs familles nobles m'ont parlé. J'imagine qu'ils souhaitaient devenir les mécènes du régiment de Zarkov. Cela pourrait être une bonne idée. Je suppose que c'est monnaie courante dans votre protectorat, mais je ne les connais pas. Que me conseillez-vous ? »
languages.original_text: "Dargonus was magnificent! Back there, all kinds of nobles approached me. I gather they're interested in becoming patrons of the Zarkov Regiment. I think it might be beneficial, since that seems to be the custom in your protectorate, but I know nothing about them. Please, what is your advice?"

traits.locale_text: « Dargonus était magnifique ! Plusieurs familles nobles m'ont parlé. J'imagine qu'ils souhaitaient devenir les mécènes du régiment de Zarkov. Cela pourrait être une bonne idée. Je suppose que c'est monnaie courante dans votre protectorat, mais je ne les connais pas. Que me conseillez-vous ? »

languages.text: «¡Dargonus era magnífico! Allí, todo tipo de nobles quiso acercarse a hablar conmigo. Parece que están interesados en patrocinar al regimiento de Zarkov. Creo que puede tener sus beneficios, y parece ser una costumbre de su protectorado, pero no sé nada al respecto. ¿Puede aconsejarme?».
languages.original_text: "Dargonus was magnificent! Back there, all kinds of nobles approached me. I gather they're interested in becoming patrons of the Zarkov Regiment. I think it might be beneficial, since that seems to be the custom in your protectorate, but I know nothing about them. Please, what is your advice?"

traits.locale_text: «¡Dargonus era magnífico! Allí, todo tipo de nobles quiso acercarse a hablar conmigo. Parece que están interesados en patrocinar al regimiento de Zarkov. Creo que puede tener sus beneficios, y parece ser una costumbre de su protectorado, pero no sé nada al respecto. ¿Puede aconsejarme?».
